title: post_v1_chats_create_and_get_chat
description: Create a chat then retrieve it. POST /v1/chats with JSON {"title": "Rec Test Chat"}. Response is NESTED: {"chat": {"id": "uuid", "title": "...", ...}}. Get chat_id via response.json()['chat']['id']. Then GET /v1/chats/{chat_id} — verify response.json()['chat']['id'] matches and title matches. Also GET /v1/chats and verify the chat appears in response.json()['items'] list.

title: get_v1_chats_chatid_not_found_and_invalid_uuid
description: GET /v1/chats/not-a-uuid should return 422. GET /v1/chats/00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000 should return 404. Verify both status codes.

title: get_v1_chats_chatid_shorts_empty
description: Create a chat via POST /v1/chats with JSON {"title": "Shorts Test"}, extract chat_id from response.json()['chat']['id']. Then GET /v1/chats/{chat_id}/shorts. Response: {"chat_id": "...", "items": [...]}. For a new chat with no batches, items should be an empty list. Verify status 200.

title: post_v1_chats_chatid_engagement_valid
description: Create a chat via POST /v1/chats with JSON {"title": "Engagement Test"}, extract chat_id from response.json()['chat']['id']. Then POST /v1/chats/{chat_id}/engagement with JSON: {"item_id": "<uuid4>", "viewer_id": "<uuid4>", "session_id": "<uuid4>", "watch_time_seconds": 25.0, "completion_ratio": 0.8, "liked": true}. Fields item_id, viewer_id, session_id are REQUIRED strings. Response: {"engagement": {"id": "...", ...}}. Verify status 200.

title: post_v1_chats_chatid_engagement_errors
description: Test engagement error paths. (1) POST /v1/chats/00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000/engagement with valid body {"item_id":"a","viewer_id":"b","session_id":"c"} should return 404. (2) Create a chat, extract chat_id from response.json()['chat']['id'], then POST engagement with missing item_id: {"viewer_id":"x","session_id":"y"} should return 422.

title: get_v1_chats_chatid_recommendations_insufficient_data
description: Create a chat via POST /v1/chats with JSON {"title": "Recs Test"}, extract chat_id from response.json()['chat']['id']. Then GET /v1/chats/{chat_id}/recommendations. Response: {"chat_id": "...", "has_enough_data": false, "reels_tracked": 0, "min_reels_required": 3, ...}. Verify status 200, has_enough_data is false.

title: get_v1_chats_chatid_recommendations_not_found
description: GET /v1/chats/00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000/recommendations should return 404 for non-existent chat.
